title: PointBlank's Printer Power
description: Energy mod that allows the popular gun mod, Vic's Point Blank, printing station to require FE in order to function.
body:
Only supported version is 1.20.1 and requires [**Pointblank: Jelly (1.20.1)**](https://modrinth.com/mod/pb-jelly) and [**Geckolib (1.20.1)**](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib/versions) in order to function properly. I may consider porting this feature to 1.21.1 later down the line.

 

This mod is a simple, lightweight addon for Pointblank that requires Forge Energy (FE) in order to craft. Right now it's set with a 50k FE max and uses 10k per crafting action.

 

The goal of this mod is to fit Point Blank in a more realistic manner and is designed for a personnally develop Minecraft Modpack.

 

I hope you enjoy! Feel free to let me know of any issues in the comment section.

 

-Golden
